title: Orange Dew Light Meal
description: A smoky and light Portuguese brunch dish featuring orange juice, dumplings (dum), and a fodmap-friendly twist.
instructions: Juice the oranges and set aside.
Warm up the orange juice in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir in any desired flavorings such as garlic, smoked paprika or chili flakes for extra smokiness.
Prepare your dumplings according to recipe instructions. Serve hot with some of the warm orange juice mixture poured over them.
Provide a side of your Fodmap-friendly dipping sauce alongside the meal for those who enjoy it.
